Bash(ECR_URL="073941171096.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/infraready-runner" && cd /Users/krunalp/claud-code && docker buildx build \\
  --platform linux/amd64 \\
  --provenance=false \\
  --no-cache \\
  -f packages/runner/Dockerfile \\
  -t "${ECR_URL}:latest" \\
  --push \\
  . 2>&1 | grep -E "\(DONE|CACHED|ERROR|pushing manifest|Step\)")

Bash(ECR="073941171096.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/infraready-runner"
cd /Users/krunalp/claud-code

aws ecr get-login-password --region us-east-1 | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin $ECR 2>&1 && \\
docker build \\
  --platform linux/amd64 \\
  --provenance=false \\
  --no-cache \\
  -t $ECR:latest \\
  -f packages/runner/Dockerfile . 2>&1 | tail -5)

Bash(sed -i '' \\
  's/border-sky-500\\/50 bg-sky-500\\/10 ring-1 ring-sky-500\\/30/border-orange-500\\/50 bg-orange-500\\/10 ring-1 ring-orange-500\\/30/g' \\
  apps/web/app/\\\(dashboard\\\)/projects/new/page.tsx

sed -i '' \\

  apps/web/app/\\\(dashboard\\\)/projects/new/page.tsx

sed -i '' \\
  's/text-sky-300/text-orange-300/g' \\
  apps/web/app/\\\(dashboard\\\)/projects/new/page.tsx

sed -i '' \\
  's/bg-sky-500 hover:bg-sky-400 disabled:bg-sky-500\\/40/bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-400 disabled:bg-orange-500\\/40/g' \\
  apps/web/app/\\\(dashboard\\\)/projects/new/page.tsx

sed -i '' \\
  's/bg-sky-500\\/20 text-sky-400 border border-sky-500\\/30/bg-orange-500\\/20 text-orange-400 border border-orange-500\\/30/g' \\
  apps/web/app/\\\(dashboard\\\)/projects/new/page.tsx

sed -i '' \\
  's/bg-sky-500\\/20 text-orange-400/bg-orange-500\\/20 text-orange-400/g' \\
  apps/web/app/\\\(dashboard\\\)/projects/new/page.tsx

sed -i '' \\
  's/bg-sky-500 flex/bg-orange-500 flex/g' \\
  apps/web/app/\\\(dashboard\\\)/projects/new/page.tsx

sed -i '' \\
  's/border-sky-500\\/20 bg-sky-500\\/\\[0.03\\]/border-orange-500\\/20 bg-orange-500\\/[0.03]/g' \\
  apps/web/app/\\\(dashboard\\\)/projects/new/page.tsx

sed -i '' \\
  's/border-sky-500\\/30 bg-sky-500\\/\\[0.05\\] hover:bg-sky-500\\/\\[0.08\\]/border-orange-500\\/30 bg-orange-500\\/[0.05] hover:bg-orange-500\\/[0.08]/g' \\
  apps/web/app/\\\(dashboard\\\)/projects/new/page.tsx

sed -i '' \\
  's/bg-sky-500\\/20 text-orange-400/bg-orange-500\\/20 text-orange-400/g' \\
  apps/web/app/\\\(dashboard\\\)/projects/new/page.tsx

sed -i '' \\
  's/bg-sky-500\\/20 text-sky-400/bg-orange-500\\/20 text-orange-400/g' \\
  apps/web/app/\\\(dashboard\\\)/projects/new/page.tsx

sed -i '' \\
  's/bg-sky-500\\/20 text-orange-400/bg-orange-500\\/20 text-orange-400/g' \\
  apps/web/app/\\\(dashboard\\\)/projects/new/page.tsx

sed -i '' \\
  "s/checked ? \\"bg-sky-500\\" : \\"bg-gray-700\\"/checked ? \\"bg-orange-500\\" : \\"bg-gray-700\\"/g" \\
  apps/web/app/\\\(dashboard\\\)/projects/new/page.tsx

echo "Done")

Bash(export PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH"
B="/Users/krunalp/claud-code/.claude/skills/gstack/browse/dist/browse"

echo "=== 2. HERO SECTION ==="
$B js "document.body.textContent.includes\('Deploy AWS infrastructure'\)"

$B is visible "section"

].every\(t => document.body.textContent.includes\(t\)\)"

Bash(for STREAM in \\
  "2026/03/20/[\\$LATEST]b4f3f9f26eef4f17b9b08ec783583fff" \\
  "2026/03/20/[\\$LATEST]3b49e94309ed4e62bd7b62fbf229d058" \\
  "2026/03/20/[\\$LATEST]4fa9e6fdf3e64166afab4d55bedfc63e"; do
  echo "=== STREAM: $STREAM ==="
  aws logs get-log-events \\
    --log-group-name /aws/lambda/infraready-runner \\
    --log-stream-name "$STREAM" \\
    --limit 150 \\
    --query "events[*].message" --output text \\
    --region us-east-1 2>/dev/null
  echo ""
done)

Bash(for Q in "infraready-deploy.fifo" "infraready-deploy-dlq.fifo"; do
  URL="https://sqs.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/073941171096/$Q"
  echo "=== $Q ==="
  aws sqs get-queue-attributes \\
    --queue-url "$URL" \\
    --attribute-names ApproximateNumberOfMessages ApproximateNumberOfMessagesNotVisible ApproximateNumberOfMessagesDelayed \\
    --region us-east-1 2>/dev/null
done)

Bash(curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $\(git config --global github.token 2>/dev/null || cat ~/.github_token 2>/dev/null\)" \\
  "https://api.github.com/repos/infraready099/infrareadu-code-first/actions/runs?per_page=3" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys,json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for r in data.get\('workflow_runs',[]\): 
  print\(r.get\('name','?'\), '|', r.get\('status','?'\), '|', r.get\('conclusion','?'\), '|', r.get\('head_sha','?'\)[:8]\)
" 2>/dev/null || echo "Can't check GH Actions — CI will run in background")
